issues.title: Error processing chat completion
issues.body:
When using the OpenAiChatClient of SpringAI to call the output stream method, the error message keeps getting: Error processing chat completion -- Java. lang. NullPointerException: null

Instead of streaming output, it is normal and I cannot solve this problem. How should I troubleshoot this issue?
My environment is JDK17 SpringBoot3. x
Here is the complete error message:

![微信截图_20240704100928](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/assets/110242905/45d3655c-ebf4-485d-91e8-ba8331c13fd4)

comments.body:
I don't think implementation `OpenAiChatClient` exists. Do you mean `OpenAiChatModel` like the following?

https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/f171b0fa5e8612a793a4599ad57de7ff598cd68f/models/spring-ai-openai/src/test/java/org/springframework/ai/openai/chat/OpenAiChatModelWithChatResponseMetadataTests.java#L61

By the way, I strongly suggest [using constructor injection instead of field injection](https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/spring-dependency-injection-autowired-vs-constructor-injection/#:~:text=Nullability%20is%20less%20of%20a%20concern) to catch similar errors at compile-time instead of at runtime. If you hover over `@Autowired`, you'll get this refactoring recommendation.
@whiteInJava is this still an issue? If so, do you have any additional information based on what @codespearhead mentioned in previous comment?
@whiteInJava Closing this issue for now. Please feel free to re-open if you still see the issue.

issues.title: Add documentation how to use the OpenAI model client to access Groq inference engine.
issues.body:
The [Groq API](https://console.groq.com/docs/api-reference#chat-create) provides high level of compatibility with the OpenAI API.
The existing Spring AI OpenAI model client can be used to access the Groq inference API for most chat completion tasks. 
Provide documentation and instructions how to re-use the OpenAI Model Client for accessing the Groq chat completion endpoint.

comments.body: Also how to access multiple inference engines at once

issues.title: 【Spring AI】 pgvector +   qianfan Embedding = Embedding failed: error code:3, message:Unsupported openapi method

comments.body: hi, please make sure the corresponding model is activated by visiting the console page: https://console.bce.baidu.com/qianfan/ais/console/onlineService
It has been opened. It is OK for me to use chat and Embedding separately, but the above problems will arise if pgvector is used
I don't see anything related to PGVector in the stack trace.  If you can provide an example code to reproduce it, we can investigate further.

@MaRuifu Please try the latest and let us know if you still see the issues. Also, please note that qianfan module is moved into Spring AI Community [here](https://github.com/spring-ai-community/qianfan)
